project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Backup MFC40 repaired with replacement fingers, master calibration and full string checks good. Managed to get the well injecting again. Have been running gauge cutter and hand jarring 50ft followed by 1 hour injection. Have reached a depth of 1268 ft so far. Current lookahead for MFC40 run is tomorrow Morning ~6am. Boat with replacement batteries leaving Esjberg today.
